name: 02 - Chunked Upload for Large Files (Cloudflare Safe)

parameters.content:
## Chunked Upload for Large Files

Demonstrates the 3-step chunked upload API for files over 50MB.
Required when running behind Cloudflare Tunnels (100MB request limit).

**API Features Used:**
- `POST /api/v1/uploads` — initiate chunked session
- `POST /api/v1/uploads/{id}/chunks` — upload 50MB chunks
- `POST /api/v1/uploads/{id}/complete` — reassemble & start job
- `GET /api/v1/jobs/{id}` — poll status
- `GET /api/v1/jobs/{id}/files/{name}` — download results

**How it works:**
1. Code node splits file into 50MB chunks
2. Performs the entire chunked upload (initiate, upload chunks, complete) in one step
3. Outputs job_id for the polling loop
4. Poll for completion, return results

**Max file size:** 10GB (200 chunks x 50MB)

nodes.name: Receive Large File
nodes.notes: For files > 50MB. Binary data will be split and uploaded as chunks.

parameters.content:
## Chunked Upload Code Node

The Code node handles the entire chunked upload in one step:
1. Splits file into 50MB chunks
2. `POST /api/v1/uploads` — initiate session
3. `POST /api/v1/uploads/{id}/chunks` — upload each chunk
4. `POST /api/v1/uploads/{id}/complete` — reassemble & start

This avoids n8n item-iteration issues where only the first
chunk would go to initiate but all need the upload_id.

Chunk endpoint is rate-limit exempt for streaming.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'completed', job_id: $('Init Poll').item.json.jobId, file_size_mb: $('Chunked Upload (Initiate + Upload + Complete)').item.json.file_size_mb, files: $('Poll Status').item.json.output_files }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'error', message: 'Failed or timed out' }) }}

meta.description: Demonstrates the 3-step chunked upload API for large files (>50MB). A single Code node splits the file into 50MB chunks, initiates the upload session, uploads all chunks, and completes the upload. Supports files up to 10GB (200 chunks).
